title: Clean ARCHITECTURE.md of leftover task instructions and fix accuracy gaps
description:
Update ARCHITECTURE.md to reflect agentic-core extraction and fix all accuracy gaps. Specific changes needed:
1. MAJOR: Remove leftover task instructions from lines 55-75 — these are not architecture documentation
2. Update Module Structure section for agentic-core/agentic-lite split (packages/agentic-core/ with loop.ts, types.ts, providers/; agentic-lite with ask.ts, tools/)
3. Update Data Flow to show runAgentLoop call chain: ask() → buildToolDefs → buildToolExecutor → runAgentLoop → provider.chat → executeToolCall callback
4. Add Dependencies section showing agentic-lite depends on agentic-core, agentic-filesystem, agentic-shell, quickjs-emscripten, pyodide; agentic-core has zero deps
5. Fix Provider/ToolDefinition location: they're in agentic-core now (src/providers/ was deleted)
6. Fix 'Provider Resolution fallback example' (line 51): shows createOpenAIProvider(baseUrl, apiKey, model) but actual code passes config object
7. Fix overview: says 'single ask()' but also exports createProvider()
8. Fix tools/index.ts description: says 'tool registry' but it's a barrel export; registration logic is in ask.ts
9. Add toolConfig to AgenticConfig fields listing
10. Update Key Interfaces to note agentic-core ownership of Provider, ToolDefinition, AgentLoopConfig, AgentLoopResult
Acceptance: architecture match improves from 93% toward ≥95%
